data.name: Sapphic Space
data.detailed_description:
• Lesbian and solo female adult content!
  • Diverse human, android and alien lady characters!
  • Immersive sci-fi world!
  • A branching narrative with seven unique endings!

Sapphic Space is a sci-fi visual novel with a varied cast of women characters and pleasing lesbian adult content.

Play multiple times to get different endings and different relationships with the lovely ladies!



The ship needs repairs!

Play as Miss Yournamehere, the ship computer, and help the ship's android, Susu, get it up and running again!

The story is inspired by classic sci-fi stories and doesn't take itself too seriously.

The adult content involves women only (with some objects/tentacles) as part of Susu's story.



About Leaflet Games: Leaflet Games is a solo, queer, independent game developer (they/them) who enjoys creating positive and interesting adult stories about queer women in fantasy or sci-fi settings.

  • Diverse human, android and alien lady characters!

data.short_description: A women-loving-women choices-matter adult visual novel in a sci-fi setting! Experience lesbian love with an android on a spaceship. Play as Miss Yournamehere, the ship computer, and influence the story towards romance with diverse lady characters and multiple endings.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL EX 2 or WebGL
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 3 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 Compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
